# FixIt Expresso — TurboChef & MerryChef Speed Oven Repair Seattle

> Seattle's Authorized TurboChef and MerryChef Service Provider. Factory-trained technicians, 21+ years experience, serving all of the greater Puget Sound region.

## About

FixIt Expresso specializes in repairing commercial speed ovens (high-speed combination ovens) for restaurants, hotels, hospitals, schools, and commercial kitchens across the greater Seattle area.

- Phone: 425-547-0200
- Email: services@fixitexpresso.com
- Hours: Monday–Sunday 9AM–5PM
- Google Rating: 5.0 stars (20+ verified reviews)
- Service Area: Seattle and surrounding Puget Sound region (within 80 miles)

## TurboChef Repair (Primary Specialty)

Authorized TurboChef Service Provider — warranty and non-warranty repairs on all TurboChef models.

**Models serviced:**
- Sota (also called NGO) — most common, drop-off eligible
- Bullet / Encore — popular in Subway and fast-casual restaurants
- HhD Double Batch — used by Panera Bread
- i3, i5 — chain restaurant and franchise models
- NGC — high-volume commercial kitchens
- ECO, Fire — energy and high-heat models
- Legacy: HhC, Conveyor, Tornado, C3, C4, Plexor

**TurboChef Error Codes (F1–F10):**
- F1: Blower Running Status Bad
- F2: Cook Temperature Low
- F3: Magnetron Current Low
- F4: Door Monitor Defective
- F5: Magnetron Over Temperature
- F6: EC Temp High
- F7: RTD Failure (temperature probe)
- F8: High Limit Tripped / Heat Low
- F9: Belt Failure / Temp High
- F10: Communication Failure

Full guide: https://www.fixitexpresso.com/common-turbochef-problems.html

**TurboChef services:**
- Same-day emergency service available
- On-site repair at your location
- Drop-off service for Sota (NGO) models
- OEM parts stocked for first-visit repairs
- Error code diagnosis over the phone where possible

## MerryChef Repair (Secondary Specialty)

Authorized MerryChef Service Provider for eikon and conneX series ovens.

**Models serviced:**
- eikon e1s, e2s — compact countertop speed ovens
- eikon e4s, e4 — high-volume dual-cavity models
- eikon e3 — mid-range model
- conneX 12, conneX 16 — modern high-capacity connected ovens

**MerryChef Error Codes (E101–E117):**
- E101: Microwave system failure
- E102: Heater current fault
- E103: Electronics overheating (often dirty filter)
- E104: Magnetron/cavity overheat
- E105: Power supply issue (voltage fault)
- E106: Cavity temperature too high
- E107: Internal communication error
- E108: Personality module / SD card error
- E109: Personality module failure
- E110: Firmware version conflict
- E111: Cavity temperature sensor error
- E113: Microwave safety fault (stop using oven)
- E115: Convection fan failure
- E116: Heater failure
- E117: Magnetron overheat

Full guide: https://www.fixitexpresso.com/common-merrychef-problems.html
